examples: But this time there are no pantomime villains, like bolshy shop stewards or incompetent managers, to make sense of the narrative.
Teenager is at the sensible age, on the one hand, they are not mature enough, on the other hand, they are very bolshy, they don't listen to what their parent tell them, they will go against parents.
The grumpiness is not confined to bolshy academics and rioting students.
